name: context-lsp
description: Codex-centered context layer for project planning, code output, and architecture drift checks.

interface.shortDescription: Project context retrieval and drift checks for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Context LSP helps Codex retrieve project planning docs, build ContextPacks, and report architecture drift before and after implementation work.
defaultPrompt: Use Context LSP to plan this change from project docs.
Use Context LSP to verify architecture drift.
Use Context LSP to update the project brain.
